Package pjv.model

Class Message

java.lang.Object
pjv.model.Message
@Entity
public class Message
extends java.lang.Object
Message entity class. This class is mapped by the Hibernate. It contains all required information about the messages sent by clients.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Oľga Ostashchuk and Michal Pechník

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    Message()  

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    java.time.LocalDateTime getDateTime()
    This method gets date and time when the message was sent.
    int getFromClientId()
    This method gets ID of client who sent the message.
    java.lang.String getFromClientName()
    This method gets name of client who sent the message.
    int getIdMessage()
    This method gets ID of Message instance.
    java.lang.String getMessageText()
    This method gets text of the sent message.
    int getToChatRoomId()
    This method gets ID of chatRoom in which the message was sent.
    java.lang.String getToClientName()
    This method gets name of client to whom the private message was sent.
    java.lang.String privateToString()
    This method creates a string representation of the Message instance if the sent message was private.
    void setDateTime​(java.time.LocalDateTime dateTime)
    This method sets date and time when the message was sent.
    void setFromClientId​(int fromClientId)
    This method sets ID of client who sent the message.
    void setFromClientName​(java.lang.String fromClientName)
    This method sets name of client who sent the message.
    void setIdMessage​(int idMessage)
    This method sets ID of Message instance.
    void setMessageText​(java.lang.String messageText)
    This method sets text of the sent message.
    void setToChatRoomId​(int toChatRoomId)
    This method sets ID of chatRoom in which the message was sent.
    void setToClientName​(java.lang.String toClientName)
    This method sets name of client to whom the private message was sent.
    java.lang.String toString()
    This method overrides toString() method of Object class to create a string representation of the Message instance.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait
